Priya Mehta

Pune, Maharashtra

PROFILE
Backend developer with 4 years of experience building web applications using Python and Django. Comfortable with AWS basics and SQL. Looking to grow into larger distributed systems work.

WORK EXPERIENCE

Software Developer — Backend
FinTrack Software Pvt. Ltd., Pune
March 2021 – Present

- Developed and maintained Django REST Framework APIs for a personal finance management application with 15,000 monthly active users
- Wrote SQL queries and Django ORM queries against PostgreSQL database; basic index tuning for slow queries
- Deployed application on AWS EC2 instances; configured S3 buckets for file storage; basic CloudWatch alarms
- Implemented background jobs using Celery and Redis for email notifications and PDF report generation
- Wrote unit and integration tests using pytest; coverage around 70% on core business logic
- Participated in biweekly code reviews; collaborated with 2 frontend developers and 1 designer

Junior Python Developer
SoftCraft Technologies, Pune
January 2020 – February 2021

- Built internal tooling and automation scripts in Python
- Assisted senior developers in maintaining a Django e-commerce backend
- Fixed bugs, wrote migrations, and wrote basic API endpoints under supervision
- Used Git for version control; basic branching and pull request workflow

EDUCATION

BITS Pilani, Goa Campus
August 2016 – May 2020 | CGPA: 7.8/10

PROJECTS

Budget Tracker App (personal project)
A Django + PostgreSQL web app for tracking monthly expenses. Deployed on a single EC2 t2.micro instance. Basic CRUD with authentication.

CSV Data Import Tool
Python script for bulk-importing customer data from CSV files into PostgreSQL, with validation and error reporting.
